pages.title: 入: ink arena
pages.text: Position: short combat arena that grants vanilla supplies and brush momentum. Writing $(l)入$() builds an aerial arena: obsidian center, expanding deepslate floor, then walls and waves.

pages.title: Rewards
pages.text: Victory rewards vanilla supplies by stave tier: low tiers give iron/coal/bread, mid tiers add gold, iron+ can add diamonds, diamond+ adds golden apples and lapis, netherite can add netherite scrap.$(br2)$(l)入$() grants a small random ink core reward: wood 0-1, stone 1-2, copper 2-3, iron 3-4, gold 4-5, diamond 5-6, netherite 6-7. It also grants momentum to the entry stave: wood +5, stone +8, copper +10, iron/gold +12, diamond/netherite +15.

pages.title: Leaving
pages.text: After victory, the arena stays open. Pick up loot, then write $(l)出$() to leave. Loose arena drops are moved back to your feet during exit cleanup.$(br2)Death or logout ends the challenge and clears the arena.

pages.title: 出
pages.text: $(l)出$() is the controlled exit glyph. It is valid after an 入 arena has been cleared.$(br2)It plays the exit effect and returns you to the original place, then removes the arena and temporary lights.
